rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §7.0405 governs TEA's posting of de-identified postsecondary outcomes data on its website. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraisals, or school funding formulas affected by Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Subject to Subsection (b), the agency shall post on the agency's Internet website the following de-identified data, disaggregated by school district or open-enrollment charter school, high school campus, and annual cohort for the 10 most recent annual cohorts:
_note: Rule concerns data-posting requirements only; no operative connection to property tax exemptions or revenue mechanisms.
